title: 有馬記念の後に・ファイナルアプローチ

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Mayano! Mayano!
Mayano! Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...I won.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I did it. I won against Brian.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer! I... I...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I was incredible, wasn't I? I was totally twinkly, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! Traaaaainer!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... I'm still out of breath...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I lost. I pulled out all the stops... and was
defeated. But... I don't hate this feeling.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph, this is...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Brian!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Are you really okay with this?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, right. It's not over yet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I still have my final announcement.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You are as rigid as a mountain... I suppose I can't
change your mind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...The press is already waiting. You might as well
make your ceremony as brilliant as possible.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
All right, Brian. We're scheduled to start in five
minutes.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Right... Got it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I finished running on turf. Not the turf at
the academy, but the turf here.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: No way! Brian! Show us more of your majesty!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Please don't quit!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Enough whining. You can take your
dreams...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: And shove them onto Mayano Top Gun.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: —Okay! A-and now, Narita Brian's final—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Stooooop!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
No way can I just sit back and watch this happen!
You're not allowed to quit, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Huh?! B-but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No buts! I don't want her to quit, so she can't!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hey.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You think you can simply show up out of nowhere
and talk whatever garbage you want? You
already won.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Think about what that means! Spare me your
childish antics.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But I am a child!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
A child who's gonna become a grown-up racer
who faces off against you a lot, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's why I can say whatever I want! Even if it's
selfish—because I'm a kid!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wanna keep running with you, Brian! Promise
you'll race against me again!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What's wrong with you? Please, today is—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You're not quitting!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Don't quit, Brian! Face off against
the champion!

text_block_list.name: Spectator E
text_block_list.text:
It's not like you to turn down a challenge like
that, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Who asked you to chime in?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Haha! Everyone knows you well, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But I know you even better. I mean, even now...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I can tell that you wanna run with me again—that
you wanna get even more excited!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehe! That's why I'm gonna stick with you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The more I race against someone who twinkles
like you, the more twinkly of a grown-up I can
become!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What a load of crap.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You're demanding I keep racing out of pure
selfishness.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That's right!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Damn it. You're nothing but a hopeless child.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but I'll be a grown-up in no time! ☆

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's not what I was getting at...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Accept your defeat, Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No one here wants you to quit.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Not even you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You still have time to change your mind. Make
this ceremony into one of a different kind.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, good idea! We'll make it my challenge
ceremony!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What?! As if I would hand over the spotlight—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: C'mon, it's no big deal! Right, President?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I find no issue with that. I'm sure the press
will also enjoy this exciting turn of events.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that! ☆

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What a child you are.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! ☆ You must be dying to see me all
grown-up. You can hardly even wait, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Indeed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I hate to admit it, but I'm looking forward to it.
